windows.transcript: the jar and I still leave it at around 80 to 90%. I will let that wax cool once the wax is cooled down.
windows.embed_text_v2: Rows of clear glass jar candles filled with cooling cream-yellow set wax and upright braided wicks, freshly poured candles curing, glossy smooth surfaces
windows.summary_v2: A near-static shot of rows of clear glass jars filled with cooling cream-yellow candle wax, each with an upright centred wick, under a channel watermark.

tags_v2.action: showing rows of poured jar candles cooling and setting

seconds_v2.desc: Rows of clear glass jars filled with cooling cream-yellow wax, each holding an upright braided wick; a 'SOSA CANDLES' watermark sits top-right.
Same staggered rows of filled jar candles, glossy pale-yellow set wax surfaces and centred wicks, channel logo overlaid.
Near-static view of the grouped jar candles, one front jar showing a still-slightly-uneven cooling wax top.
The cluster of cream-coloured wax-filled jars stays in frame, wicks standing upright, watermark top-right.
Filled glass jar candles in tight rows, smooth yellow wax catching light, braided wicks centred.
Continued steady shot of the cooling jar candles, faint swirl on one front jar's wax surface.
The rows of pale-yellow jar candles remain, wicks upright, 'SOSA CANDLES' overlay visible.
Same grouping of wax-filled jars setting, glossy cream surfaces and centred wicks held in frame.
Final framing of the rows of clear jars filled with cooling cream-yellow candle wax and upright wicks.
